page.title: Canados 86: Best Boat in Marbella for Corporate retreats and large groups

data.meta_description: Canados 86: the best boat in Marbella for corporate retreats and large groups. 26m, 12 pax, departs Puerto Banús. Book your luxury charter today.
data.summary: The Canados 86 is the top choice for corporate retreats and large groups in Marbella. At 26m with capacity for 12 guests, it offers premium amenities and departs from Puerto Banús.
key_facts: Ideal for corporate retreats and large groups
Licensed skipper, fuel, and insurance included
Drinks: water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
Spanish IVA (21%) included in all bookings

faq.q: How many guests can the Canados 86 accommodate?
faq.a: The Canados 86 can accommodate up to 12 guests, making it perfect for corporate retreats and large group outings in Marbella.

faq.q: Where does the Canados 86 depart from?
faq.a: The Canados 86 departs from Puerto Banús, the iconic marina in Marbella known for its luxury yachts and vibrant atmosphere.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price for the Canados 86?
faq.a: The charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%).

faq.q: How do I book the Canados 86?
faq.a: Pricing for the Canados 86 is on request via WhatsApp. Contact us to check availability and get a personalised quote for your corporate retreat or group event.

faq.q: Is the Canados 86 suitable for corporate events?
faq.a: Yes, the Canados 86 is ideal for corporate retreats, with ample deck space, a comfortable interior, and capacity for 12 guests. It offers a professional setting for networking or team-building.

faq.q: What are some popular destinations near Marbella for a charter on the Canados 86?
faq.a: Popular destinations include Cabopino, Estepona, Sotogrande, Cala del Faro, and Cala Cortés. The skipper can tailor the itinerary to your preferences.

faq.q: Can I bring my own food and drinks on the Canados 86?
faq.a: The charter includes drinks and light snacks. If you have specific catering needs for a corporate retreat, please discuss them with us via WhatsApp when booking.

faq.q: What is the difference between the Canados 86 and other large boats in your fleet?
faq.a: At 26m, the Canados 86 is one of the largest in our fleet, offering a spacious flybridge and saloon. It is ideal for groups seeking luxury and comfort, while other boats like the Mangusta 80 (24m) or Ferretti 94 (29m) offer different layouts.

data.body_html:
When planning a corporate retreat or a large group outing in Marbella, the choice of boat can make or break the experience. The Canados 86 stands out as the best option for such occasions, offering a perfect blend of space, luxury, and functionality. At 26 metres long and accommodating up to 12 guests, this yacht provides ample room for networking, relaxation, and celebration, all while departing from the prestigious Puerto Banús. Whether you're hosting clients, rewarding a team, or organising a family reunion, the Canados 86 delivers a premium experience that combines the best of the Costa del Sol.

Why the Canados 86 is the best for corporate retreats

Corporate retreats require a setting that fosters both productivity and relaxation. The Canados 86 excels in this regard, with a spacious flybridge and a well-appointed saloon that can accommodate formal meetings or casual discussions. The yacht's design prioritises comfort, with ample seating areas both indoors and outdoors. The licensed skipper handles all navigation, allowing you to focus on your agenda while cruising the Mediterranean. From Puerto Banús, you can explore nearby spots like Cabopino or Estepona, with the flexibility to tailor the itinerary to your group's needs.

Key specifications of the Canados 86

  • Length: 26 metres (85 feet)
  • Maximum capacity: 12 guests
  • Departure point: Puerto Banús, Marbella
  • Inclusions: Licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, Spanish IVA (21%)
  • Pricing: On request via WhatsApp

These specs make the Canados 86 one of the largest and most versatile yachts in our fleet, ideal for groups that value space and luxury. For comparison, other boats like the Mangusta 80 (24m) or Ferretti 94 (29m) offer different layouts, but the Canados 86 strikes a unique balance between size and intimacy.

What makes the Canados 86 ideal for large groups

Large groups often face the challenge of finding a boat that doesn't feel cramped. The Canados 86 solves this with its generous deck space and interior volume. The flybridge offers panoramic views of the Marbella coastline, while the main deck provides shaded areas for dining and socialising. With capacity for 12 guests, it's perfect for team-building activities, client entertainment, or milestone celebrations. The yacht's layout encourages mingling, with multiple zones for conversation and relaxation.

Popular itineraries from Puerto Banús

Departing from Puerto Banús, the Canados 86 can access a range of scenic destinations along the Costa del Sol. Common itineraries include cruising to Cabopino for a swim stop, heading west to Estepona for lunch, or venturing further to Sotogrande for a more exclusive experience. For a shorter trip, Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés offer secluded coves perfect for anchoring. The skipper can customise the route based on your group's preferences, ensuring a memorable day on the water.

How to book the Canados 86 for your corporate retreat

Booking the Canados 86 is straightforward. Since pricing is on request, simply contact us via WhatsApp to discuss your dates, group size, and any special requirements. We'll provide a personalised quote and check availability. Given the yacht's popularity for corporate events, we recommend booking well in advance, especially during the peak season from May to September. All charters include the standard inclusions, but we can arrange additional catering or entertainment upon request.

Comparing the Canados 86 to other large boats in our fleet

Our fleet includes several large yachts suitable for groups, but the Canados 86 offers a distinct advantage with its 26m length and 12-guest capacity. The Ferretti 94 (29m) is larger but may feel more formal, while the Mangusta 80 (24m) is slightly smaller. The Canados 86 strikes a sweet spot, providing ample space without overwhelming the experience. For those seeking a sportier option, the Pershing 46 (14m) is available for smaller groups, but for corporate retreats, the Canados 86 is unmatched.

Frequently asked questions

How many guests can the Canados 86 accommodate?

The Canados 86 can accommodate up to 12 guests, making it perfect for corporate retreats and large group outings in Marbella.

Where does the Canados 86 depart from?

The Canados 86 departs from Puerto Banús, the iconic marina in Marbella known for its luxury yachts and vibrant atmosphere.

What is included in the charter price for the Canados 86?

The charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%).

How do I book the Canados 86?

Pricing for the Canados 86 is on request via WhatsApp. Contact us to check availability and get a personalised quote for your corporate retreat or group event.

Is the Canados 86 suitable for corporate events?

Yes, the Canados 86 is ideal for corporate retreats, with ample deck space, a comfortable interior, and capacity for 12 guests. It offers a professional setting for networking or team-building.

What are some popular destinations near Marbella for a charter on the Canados 86?

Popular destinations include Cabopino, Estepona, Sotogrande, Cala del Faro, and Cala Cortés. The skipper can tailor the itinerary to your preferences.

Can I bring my own food and drinks on the Canados 86?

The charter includes drinks and light snacks. If you have specific catering needs for a corporate retreat, please discuss them with us via WhatsApp when booking.

What is the difference between the Canados 86 and other large boats in your fleet?

At 26m, the Canados 86 is one of the largest in our fleet, offering a spacious flybridge and saloon. It is ideal for groups seeking luxury and comfort, while other boats like the Mangusta 80 (24m) or Ferretti 94 (29m) offer different layouts.

Ready to plan your corporate retreat or group charter on the Canados 86? Contact us today via WhatsApp to secure your date and experience the best of Marbella from the water.
